summary: Loom adoption guardian blockers are classified and addressed: detached host binding was fixed upstream in Loom; Syvert-owned Review Artifacts binding, merge-time metadata restore, and governing spec locator normalization are covered by local tests.
reviewed_validation_summary: Repo-relative carrier write boundaries, fact-chain locator boundaries, canonical Loom metadata parsing, runtime provenance, shadow parity closure, and Syvert governance gates are passing locally; latest review artifact commits may create carrier-only head drift.

findings.summary: Run full local gates, push PR #259, wait for CI, rerun guardian, then controlled merge.
